parameters.name: query
parameters.value: query { issues(filter: { team: { id: { eq: "e96a084f-7033-4b61-be58-3fb1e6679a50" } }, state: { type: { in: ["completed", "cancelled"] } }, updatedAt: { gte: "{{ $now.minus({days: 7}).toISO() }}" } }) { nodes { id title description comments { nodes { body } } } } }

parameters.name: system
parameters.value: You are a learning agent. Review the feedback comments from completed/cancelled Linear issues and the current agent memory. Output only a JSON object with two fields: 'new_rules' (array of strings to add to Standing rules) and 'new_patterns' (array of strings to add to Learned patterns, each prefixed with today's date). Output nothing else.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value:
=[{"role":"user","content":"Current memory:
" + $('Read Agent Memory').first().json.content + "

Feedback comments this week:
" + JSON.stringify($input.all().map(i => i.json), null, 2)}]
